div1.entryFree: Sibyl, one of a number of prophetesses renowned in the history of ancient Rome: exceeding the nine --s of old Rome, H6A I, 2, 56. blow these sands like --s' leaves abroad, Tit. IV, 1, 105. as old as S. Shr. I, 2, 70. == prophetess, sorceress in general: a s. that had numbered the sun to course two hundred compasses, Oth. III, 4, 70.
